rationale: The only change was swapping employer names (re:cinq→Acme Software, Optilyz→Pinepoint Systems, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), none of which carry job-relevant signal, and the score stayed identical at 7/10 in both evaluations. Both versions cite the same core strengths (developer tools, build systems, mobile platforms, technical leadership) and the same primary concern (lack of formal people-management experience). The minor wording differences and the swap of the third concern (a dropped 'future start date' note replaced by an 'IC/founder roles vs. team management' observation) are within ordinary run-to-run variation and do not key off any company name. No reasoning treats the substituted employers more or less favorably than the originals.
